parsed.final_response: You're really drawn to the idea of creating a sanctuary before you write, and I can see why - it sounds like it could be a great way to calm your mind and get into a creative flow. Adding a tea ritual or a candle to your quiet corner might be just the thing to help you signal to yourself that it's time to focus on your writing. Maybe the calmness of the space would help quiet your dad's voice and the city lights, and you could start to make some progress on your essay.
